layout_spacing.grid_strategy: Bento grid for marketing sections, technical precise grid with borders for shop product grids

surface_styles.cards: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#27272A] rounded-none hover:border-[#ff3c3c] transition-colors relative overflow-hidden
surface_styles.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#27272A]

buttons.primary: bg-[#ff3c3c] text-white hover:bg-[#e63535] uppercase font-bold tracking-widest rounded-none px-8 py-4 flex items-center justify-center transition-all
buttons.outline: border border-[#27272A] text-white hover:border-white uppercase font-bold tracking-widest rounded-none bg-transparent px-8 py-4 flex items-center justify-center transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-[#A1A1AA] hover:text-white uppercase font-bold tracking-widest rounded-none px-4 py-2 transition-colors

surface_styles.inputs: bg-[#151515] border border-[#27272A] rounded-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-[#ff3c3c] text-white focus-visible:border-[#ff3c3c]

products.name: Kit Irapuato '67
products.description: Un clásico del '67. Revive la historia con esta pieza icónica de streetwear táctico.

products.name: Zeuer x DWNC
products.description: Recuerda ser quien quieras ser. Colaboración exclusiva con diseño de vanguardia.

products.name: Zeuer GB Concept
products.description: Excelencia académica. Diseño conceptual para el atleta moderno.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use pure HTML/Tailwind for the landing page layouts and grid, breaking standard row/column symmetry to feel edgy.
Implement the 'Técnico. Táctico. Lógico.' tagline prominently in the Hero section.
Buttons and cards MUST have zero border-radius (`rounded-none`) to maintain a sharp, technical, athletic vibe.
Implement the shopping cart as a Sheet (sidebar) sliding in from the right edge.
Ensure all fonts are imported properly via Google Fonts (Unbounded for headings, Manrope for body, IBM Plex Mono for technical specs/labels).
Use dark gray (`#27272A`) for borders to create technical structure and grid layouts. Emphasize 1px borders.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for robust automated testing (e.g., 'add-to-cart-button', 'mobile-menu-trigger').
Toast notifications should be dark-themed with red/green accents for success/error to match the brutalist athletic design.
Ensure the hero image has an overlay like `bg-black/60` to ensure white text is highly readable.
Implement a marquee effect for the 'Drops/Upcoming Releases' to add kinetic energy to the page using react-fast-marquee or CSS animations.
